title: Requirements Document Submission
description: Metadata and summary of the PM-authored requirements document submitted for CPO approval

revision.description: Revision number — increments after each CPO rejection

document_path.description: Path to the full Requirements Document Markdown file

pm_cross_consultation_complete.description: Confirms that mandatory PM cross-consultation was conducted before submission

pm_cross_consultation_log_path.description: Path or inline reference to PM cross-consultation log

research_traceability.description: Confirms a traceability matrix linking requirements to research findings is included

edge_case_count.description: Total edge cases addressed in requirements

the_extra_edge_specced.description: Confirms the EXTRA edge from researcher_2 is represented as a specific requirement

mvp_success_metrics.description: Measurable metrics that will indicate MVP success

cross_consultations_with_cpo.description: Any CPO cross-consultations during requirements drafting

changelog.description: On revision > 1: summary of changes made since last submission
